scripts.validate: node --check src/color.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check scripts/prepare-build.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-icons.mjs && python3 -m json.tool manifest.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool manifests/manifest.firefox.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool manifests/manifest.chrome.json >/dev/null
scripts.stage:firefox: npm run icons && npm run validate && node scripts/prepare-build.mjs firefox
scripts.stage:chrome: npm run icons && npm run validate && node scripts/prepare-build.mjs chrome
scripts.stage: npm run icons && npm run validate && node scripts/prepare-build.mjs
scripts.build:firefox: npm run stage:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir build/firefox --artifacts-dir dist/firefox --overwrite-dest
scripts.build:chrome: npm run stage:chrome && web-ext build --source-dir build/chrome --artifacts-dir dist/chrome --overwrite-dest
scripts.build: npm run build:firefox && npm run build:chrome
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run stage:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir build/firefox
scripts.run:firefox: npm run stage:firefox && web-ext run --source-dir build/firefox
scripts.run:chrome: npm run stage:chrome && web-ext run --source-dir build/chrome --target chromium
